message:
fix(tests): widen flaky timing margins and tighten compliance assertion

- B05 timeout upper bound: 1s -> 5s (prevents flakes on loaded systems)
- B07 sleep lower bound: 20ms -> 10ms (accounts for timer imprecision)
- B21 compliance rate tolerance: 0.01 -> 0.007 (tighter check that still
  allows float rounding but catches actual 1% regressions)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
